Class MixedNumber

java.lang.Object
prog2.edu.slu.pregroup01.Fraction
prog2.edu.slu.MixedNumber
public class MixedNumber extends Fraction
Represents a mixed number, which is a combination of a whole number and a fraction. It extends the Fraction class, allowing operations with other MixedNumber or Fractioni objects.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private int
    whole
    The whole part of the mixed number.

    Constructs a MixedNumber from a whole number and a Fraction object.
    MixedNumber(Fraction fraction)
    Constructs a MixedNumber from a Fraction object.

  • Field Details

    • whole

      private int whole
      The whole part of the mixed number.

  • Constructor Details

    • MixedNumber

      public MixedNumber()
      Default constructor. Initializes the mixed number as 0 (0 whole part, 0 numerator, denominator 1).

    • MixedNumber

      public MixedNumber(int whole, Fraction fraction)
      Constructs a MixedNumber from a whole number and a Fraction object.
      Parameters:
      whole - The whole number part.
      fraction - The fractional part.

    • MixedNumber

      public MixedNumber(int whole, int numerator, int denominator)
      Constructs a MixedNumber from a whole number, numerator, and denominator.
      Parameters:
      whole - The whole number part.
      numerator - The numerator of the fractional part.
      denominator - The denominator of the fractional part.

    • MixedNumber

      public MixedNumber(Fraction fraction)
      Constructs a MixedNumber from a Fraction object. Automatically converts an improper fraction to a mixed number.
      Parameters:
      fraction - The fraction object to convert.

  • Method Details

    • setWholePart

      public void setWholePart(int whole)
      Sets the whole part of the mixed number.
      Parameters:
      whole - The whole number to set.

    • setFractionPart

      public void setFractionPart(Fraction fraction)
      Sets the fractional part of the mixed number.
      Parameters:
      fraction - The Fraction object to set as the fractional part.

    • getWhole

      public int getWhole()
      Returns the whole part of the mixed number.
      Returns:
      The whole number part.

    • getFractionPart

      public Fraction getFractionPart()
      Returns the fractional part of the mixed number as a Fraction object.
      Returns:
      The fractional part.

    • toFraction

      public Fraction toFraction()
      Converts this mixed number to an improper fraction.
      Returns:
      A Fraction object representing the mixed number as an improper fraction.

    • add

      public MixedNumber add(MixedNumber other)
      Adds this mixed number to another mixed number.
      Parameters:
      other - The other MixedNumber to add.
      Returns:
      A new MixedNumber representing the sum of the two MixedNumbers.

    • subtract

      public MixedNumber subtract(MixedNumber other)
      Subtracts another mixed number from this mixed number.
      Parameters:
      other - The other MixedNumber to subtract
      Returns:
      A new MixedNumber representing the difference of the two MixedNumbers.

    • multiplyBy

      public MixedNumber multiplyBy(MixedNumber other)
      Multiplies this mixed number by another mixed number.
      Parameters:
      other - The other MixedNumber to multiply by.
      Returns:
      A new MixedNumber representing the product of the two MixedNumbers.

    • divideBy

      public MixedNumber divideBy(MixedNumber other)
      Divides this mixed number by another mixed number.
      Parameters:
      other - The other MixedNumber to divide by.
      Returns:
      A new MixedNumber representing the quotient of the two MixedNumbers.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the string representation of the mixed number. Formats as "whole numerator/denominator", but omits whole or fraction part if zero.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Fraction
      Returns:
      String representation of the mixed number.

    • toDouble

      public double toDouble()
      Returns the decimal value of the mixed number.
      Overrides:
      toDouble in class Fraction
      Returns:
      Decimal value as a double.
